title: clerodendrum trichotomum var. fargesii
intro: Clerodendrum trichotomum var. fargesii, commonly known as the Fragrant Glory Bower, is a deciduous shrub native to China and is prized for its stunning white and purple flowers. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and anti-viral properties. The health benefits of Clerodendrum trichotomum var. fargesii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and soothe digestive problems. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
